name: Durango (Mexico)

colors.symbolism: the field and details of the arms

description: A white field with the coat of arms of the state of Durango centred.
history: Durango has no officially adopted state flag; the design shown — a white field bearing the state coat of arms — is in de facto use to represent the state.

features.symbolism: A white field charged with the state coat of arms, in the typical pattern of Mexican state flags.

The arms reference the founding of the city of Durango in 1563 by Francisco de Ibarra (whose family arms it adapts), the famous Cerro del Mercado iron mountain, and the mining, ranching and forestry traditions of the state.
